name: full-stack-design-system
description: Full Stack Design System — contracts + multi-package codegen

scripts.generate: pnpm exec turbo run build --filter=@full-stack-ds/codegen && node packages/ds-codegen/dist/cli.js
scripts.generate:all: pnpm exec turbo run build --filter=@full-stack-ds/codegen && node packages/ds-codegen/dist/cli.js --target=all
scripts.generate:react-native: pnpm exec turbo run build --filter=@full-stack-ds/codegen && node packages/ds-codegen/dist/cli.js --target=react-native
scripts.generate:validate: pnpm exec turbo run build --filter=@full-stack-ds/codegen && node packages/ds-codegen/dist/cli.js --validate
scripts.generate:check: pnpm exec turbo run build --filter=@full-stack-ds/codegen && node packages/ds-codegen/dist/cli.js --validate --check-semantics
scripts.generate:validate-usage: pnpm exec turbo run build --filter=@full-stack-ds/codegen && node packages/ds-codegen/dist/cli.js --validate --check-usage
scripts.generate:dry-run: pnpm exec turbo run build --filter=@full-stack-ds/codegen && node packages/ds-codegen/dist/cli.js --dry-run
scripts.generate:all:dry-run: pnpm exec turbo run build --filter=@full-stack-ds/codegen && node packages/ds-codegen/dist/cli.js --target=all --dry-run
scripts.generate:watch: pnpm exec turbo run build --filter=@full-stack-ds/codegen && node packages/ds-codegen/dist/cli.js --watch
scripts.validate:generated: pnpm exec turbo run build --filter=@full-stack-ds/codegen && node packages/ds-codegen/dist/validation/validate-cli.js
scripts.validate:generated:react-native: echo "React Native is part of the default rail: use pnpm run governed:rail (all targets) or governed:rail:react-native (targeted) so validation runs against a fresh emission manifest." && exit 1
scripts.tokens:build:check: pnpm run tokens:build && git diff --exit-code packages/ds-tokens/generated
scripts.test:frameworks: pnpm run test:vue && pnpm run test:lit && pnpm run test:svelte && pnpm run test:angular && pnpm run test:react-native
scripts.typecheck:all: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run typecheck:vue && pnpm run typecheck:angular && pnpm run typecheck:lit && pnpm run typecheck:svelte && pnpm run typecheck:react-native
